justification: The diff correctly migrates javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence, updates Hibernate to 6.x (which requires Jakarta EE), and uses Java 21 patterns like pattern matching for instanceof (e.g., lines 85-86 in EntityManagerFactoryBuilderImpl.java). It also modernizes Maven configuration by using <release> instead of <source>/<target> and updates dependencies to compatible versions. However, it doesn't fully leverage all Java 21 features (e.g., virtual threads, record patterns), so idiomatic_java21 is 4 instead of 5.
